input_spec: scene idea (one line) -> long clip via 3-segment chain
notes: CRE-3 MEASURED 2026-06-22: long-clip via 3x3.375s CHAIN (maestro mode). keyframe 8s + i2v 1480s (3 segments) + music 8s = 1592s. Output maestro_chained.mp4 (10.125s, 243 frames @24fps). DRIFT VERDICT (honest, incl. failures): chaining produces a clean concat BUT inter-segment drift is real + VISIBLE — color palette wanders (blue->pink->blue across segments), the subject's scale/position/shape shifts at each seam, the dolly motion restarts (cadence hitch) at joins, and a seam artifact appeared (malformed gull). Viable for gentle/ambient shots >3.375s but NOT seamless; best <=2 segments, or loop-mode for static scenes. This is the honest data behind the 3.375s single-segment cap caveat.
